birdeye Preview new design →
Coming August 2026 · AI Native

Beautifully
yet simple,
yet modern.

We're refreshing the Birdeye dashboard — cleaner, more modern, and fully aligned with AI Native. Same powerful features, elevated experience.

Preview the new look → See all changes
What's changing
Every update, documented.
System CTA
August 2026

System CTAs move from top to bottom

System actions leave the crowded top header and settle into the left-rail footer. Create and Ask stay up top; settings, notifications, and profile move down.

Why design needs this
  • Clear workspace. Top chrome stays focused on create/ask; account and system tools stop competing with page content.
  • Thumb- and habit-friendly. Settings, notifications, and profile live in a stable bottom-rail destination users already expect in modern app shells.
  • Scalable system actions. New utilities can join the bottom cluster without growing the header into a dense icon strip.
Before
After
Typography
August 2026

Circular replaces Inter & Poppins

We're moving to Circular as the primary typeface across the entire dashboard. Inter and Poppins are being retired.

Why design needs this
  • One voice, not two. Mixing Inter (UI) and Poppins (display) created uneven rhythm between nav, headings, and body copy.
  • Sharper hierarchy. Circular’s weights make dense dashboards easier to scan without increasing font size.
  • AI Native alignment. A single modern typeface keeps the legacy dashboard visually continuous with the next product tier.
After · Circular
Aa Bb Cc
One typeface for UI and display — clearer hierarchy, denser screens, consistent brand voice.
Regular Medium Bold
Before · Inter + Poppins
Aa Bb Cc
Two families competing — uneven spacing and mixed personality across the same screen.
Inter body Poppins heading
Before
After
Color
August 2026

Refreshed color palette

The color system is updated to align with AI Native. Tokens are cleaner, contrast ratios meet WCAG AA accessibility standards, and the palette is applied consistently across every surface in the dashboard.

New palette — refined & accessible
Ink
#111111
Brand
#0043CE
Tint
#EEF2FF
Border
#EEEEEE
Surface
#F7F7F7
Status & semantic

Active Pending Error Info
Before
After
Components
August 2026

Modernized UI components

Buttons, cards, navigation, modals, badges — every component has been updated. Softer 8px corner radius, refined spacing, and a consistent visual language across the entire dashboard.

Buttons
Card
Atlanta, GA
4.9 stars · 312 reviews · Active

Before
After
Layout
August 2026

More space, less clutter

The overall layout system is updated to introduce more intentional whitespace, improved grid alignment, and a reduced visual density — consistent with the "beautifully yet simple" principle. Everything breathes.
